text:
This port is created for updating net/dropbox-api-command to latest version (author's request).

tinderbox log here: http://iamben.csie.net/tinderbox/logs/8.2-WebService-Dropbox/p5-WebService-Dropbox-0.03.log



WebService::Dropbox is Perl interface to Dropbox API

WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/WebService-Dropbox/
